command.name: cdk
command.description: manage aws cloud development kit apps

subcommands.name: init
subcommands.description: create a new, empty CDK project from a template

subcommands.name: metadata
subcommands.description: returns all metadata associated with this stack

subcommands.name: doctor
subcommands.description: check your set-up for potential problems

subcommands.name: diff
subcommands.description: compares the specified stack with the deployed stack

subcommands.name: deploy
subcommands.description: deploy the specified stack(s) into your AWS account

subcommands.name: bootstrap
subcommands.description: deploys the CDK toolkit stack into an AWS environment

subcommands.name: synth
subcommands.description: synthesizes and prints the CloudFormation template for this stack

subcommands.name: ls
subcommands.description: list all stacks in the app

subcommands.name: import
subcommands.description: import existing resource(s) into the given STACK

subcommands.name: ack
subcommands.description: acknowledge a notice so that it does not show up anymore

subcommands.name: notices
subcommands.description: returns a list of relevant notices

subcommands.name: doc
subcommands.description: opens the reference documentation in a browser
